reviews.review_description:
Paranoia is a backrooms game which you and 4 others explore the liminal levels of the backrooms series. 

The game is in beta but it is very good with some bugs here and there!

Final rating : 9.5/10 

This may be subject to change!

I understand that the game just came out but its more on the lower quality side of games. The running animation for the bacteria in level 0 is terrible but I do like the way the levels look. The smilers in level 1 do not attack for some reason even when you get super close to them. Level 2 is quite boring due to the fact that I haven’t seen an entity. I don’t know if there is supposed to be an entity in Level 2 but it doesn’t spawn in if there is. I love the stealth idea of Level Fun and it’s the best level in the game in my opinion. Level run is good but the smiler has spawn killed me a few times. I rate this game a 5/10 and I hope you read my review to improve your game.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for the review, I really do appreciate it. We just launched in Early Access Beta which means there WILL be bugs/glitches and things that does not look good. But don't worry, a LOT of things will be improved in future updates. So we hope you can stick around. If you have any more feedback, contact me on discord: _nat1x

reviews.review_description:
It’s ok for a game that’s been done a half dozen times already.  Worth checking put! 

Update….

Devs- thanks for responding. To your question, I have no dislikes. 

The game did freeze on me in level 1 I think. I was moving keeping the wall to my left, I came to a dark area and I couldn’t get out of the blackness. Couldn’t follow the wall back. 

Also experienced the game crashing back to the oculus menu while being chased on level one.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for the review, we really appreciate it! Please let me know what your feedback is, like what do you not like about the game? Please DM me on Discord: _nat1x
We have open ears :)

reviews.review_title: Great game but has one big flaw
reviews.review_description: The levels and atmosphere of the game is great, and the game is really fun. It is one of the best Backrooms games on vr. However, the bugs and glitches make the game almost unplayable. Half of the time when I join a public lobby, I just stare at a black screen and I never get into the game. Pretty much every time I host a lobby, I would randomly get kicked at a random time. I know this isn’t a problem on my end because I’m connected to the internet. I’m really excited for the future of this great game, but these bugs need to be fixed.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review we really appreciate it. We are currently looking at and exploring a fix for this "getting kicked out" issue. Multiple people have been reporting this issue and we are looking into this.

reviews.review_title: I was mauled by a massive black monster
reviews.review_description:
10/10 recommend this to everyone on vr
Natix put tg a terrifying and hard game that is beyond fun with friends and solo if you’re a lone alpha wolf

I love this game, the best VR Backrooms game I have ever seen, the graphics and physics is the best, gameplay is also good but you can add RGB color changer for players to change their suit color, also The Party Rooms Level is too hard for guys to complete, also there is a bug that ruins the server and leaves the lobby. I really like this game, even if it's the Beta version^^

Only played the first level so take this with a grain of salt but level 0 is very empty, tall and the entity is very bad looking with what looks to be free animations. Honestly can't be asked writing a full review so to sum it up. 
Make the game feel more complete. And why do we have to be left handed? 😭

developer_response.body: Hello! We appreciate the review. We are revamping the Bacteria/Howler Entity with new animations soon, we have been getting feedback about that. We also have four more levels for free after beating Level 0, so please play through that and update your review whenever you can :) If you have any personal feedback, DM me on Discord: _nat1x <3

reviews.review_title: I'm sorry, but it's a bad game.
reviews.review_description: The game is very buggy. For example, if you move before the game starts, the game crashes and you get stuck on the stairs; you can't move, and the menu doesn't open. There are many more bugs, and some levels, like fun, are difficult and bad. The animations are also bad. I can't even connect to the servers; the levels are fun and difficult!!! I bought the entire version of the game.

The game is good and one of the best backrooms games Ive seen so far on meta, but some levels and mechanics need improvement, but Im not bashing the game as its still in development so it is what it is.

and the developers stated that they will re do levels and other features they arent happy with

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We really appreciate it! And yes, we are currently working on new levels and redoing older levels according to feedback.

reviews.review_title: One of the best backroom games
reviews.review_description:
I love how the developers are more honest than most, and I completely understand about how they need money to keep the multi-player up and I will come back to play this magnificent game over and over. I just have one question and it revolves about. Can I only buy the dlc and share it with my friends, or do they also have to buy it so we all have to play the full version. Thank you☺️

Thank you for answering me, I hope you your game is successful

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for the 5 star review we really appreciate it! The answer to your question is: yes! If a person that has the DLC hosts a lobby, all of your non-DLC friends can join in that lobby and play all of the levels currently in the game! :)

reviews.review_description: This game is really well made and is also really fun! Though it has some flaws, but it is in beta so I can’t hate. This is probably one of the best Backrooms games on this platform. And I can’t wait for the new updates to come out!
I made the soundtrack for this game, so I am partially biased. However, the game still stands out as the best Backrooms experience you can currently have in VR, with more to come in the future.

I played this game last night when it was waiting to be reviewed by meta and it was fun. The maps are pretty well made and the music and sounds are good. The only thing is on pipe dreams it isn’t super eerie and is kind of underwhelming. Also there is an area on pipe dreams that is supposed to be blocked off and a dead end but you can see through the corner of a wall and see into the void. It’s semi blocked off but you can walk around the blockers. Also the pipe dreams level should have limited vision in front so you can’t see all the way down so it’s scarier.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! I totally hear you and you have a valid complaint! We do plan to redesign Level 2 in the future to have a better layout. But we will fix the bugs in Level 2 soon. :)

reviews.review_description: At layout This seems like a good game to play. The levels look amazing. Until I see that you need to buy a 10$ dlc for the full game like come on. God forbid we get a good horror game anymore

developer_response.body: Hello, thanks for the review. We appreciate it. Making a game like this from scratch and maintaining it is not free. We cannot make the full game free, we need funds to keep multiplayer working and be able to pay people to work on this game. As well, free to play players will still get older levels for free once we add more new levels. We currently have 6 levels to play for free, and we will add more in the future. Please consider updating your review once you have played the demo version of the game, and personally let me know what you think on discord <3: _nat1x

reviews.review_description:
this game is amazing for what it is. obviously upon writing it has its bugs and issues but it’s expected when it’s early release like this.
this game has so much potential once it’s fully finished and polished.
the dev genuinely cares for the game.
is it better then no clip right now? no.
but 1 year from now it will be miles ahead of it

reviews.review_title: You can tell it’s still in early access
reviews.review_description:
The game is pretty decent and much better than a lot of other early access games I’ve played.

It feels like the devs spent most of their time on Level 0, and that’s kind of disappointing. It would’ve been cool if the other levels were much harder than they already are. Level 0.2, Level FUN, and Level 1 feel like such a walking simulator.

I recommend if you’re bored or just trying to have a good laugh with friends.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for the review, we really appreciate it! We totally get your feedback, we are expanding level 0, 0.2 and 1 in the upcoming future so we can make those levels more enjoyable the way they are right now. We also have way more levels outside the demo if you get the DLC (over 11 in total) We hope you stick around so you can play the new levels for free to play players.

reviews.review_description: Unlike the other back rooms virtual reality, horror games this one is realistic, good looking, and even though it is still an early access, still manages to outplay most of the full-fledged back rooms, VR horror games, actually scary monsters, weight capacity on your backpack, and also a stamina system(which if you ask me is already advanced for early access) I would recommend this game to anybody that likes the back rooms.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We really appreciate it <3

reviews.review_description:
Fun backrooms game, ye the monster is a bit slow and do are you but it's good for early access. 
Have been waiting for this game for a decent bit and I would say that it reaches expectations considering its early access, keep up the good work

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Let us know more feedback from you by adding me on Discord: _nat1x

reviews.review_description:
Maybe I'm just not a backrooms sorta guy. I like good graphics (nope) good gameplay (nope) easy to use interface (nope) human sized arms (double nope) this seems a long way from being either ready or interesting. 

But, extra star for C64 reference.

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for the review. We appreciate it. Can you clarify your feedback by sending us a message through discord? Please send me a message: _nat1x - We wanna improve the game as much as we can <3

reviews.review_description: I've read some of the reviews and I'm not the only person with "the getting kicked out issue" i mean its an awesome game but y'all need to get this fixed its almost unplayable.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review we really appreciate it. We are currently looking at and exploring a fix for this "getting kicked out" issue. Multiple people have been reporting this issue and we are looking into this.

reviews.review_description: Every time i join a game it goes to black or kick me off and it doesn't tell how to start

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review we appreciate it. We just fixed this issue, please load up the game again and let me know if the issue still persists. We were doing testing last night and this caused some players to glitch out, which is mostly what happened, super sorry about that. Please let me know on discord: _nat1x

reviews.review_description: Heard you got that drip, drip, drip, drip drip

I’ve only played the first few levels, but it’s seriously great! Atmosphere is really good, eerie, keeps you engaged. Really looming forward to the rest of the game. 

(I’m playing the paid version)
the game is very good but theres never players online
The game makes you use your left hand and it’s broken for me and some others so we can’t even play please allow people to use there right hand.

developer_response.body: Hello, thanks for the review. We appreciate it. The game only uses your left hand for interacting with the UI. We are working on making the UI work with both hands as of right now. In the meantime, please try to get new controllers!

reviews.review_description: The game has a lot of players good graphics but they need to fix the head it looks weird to me aaaand that’s why you should give them a pla
This game is so well made! It Just needs more levels.
Good running textures  the entity glitches out though
Amazing Game I Recomend 10/10

reviews.review_title: They added triple to the game❤️🙀
reviews.review_description: Love this game so much -natix's pookie bear

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review shrekky, we really appreciate it <3

reviews.review_description: one of the only well made backroom games on standalone .no gtag movement its peak
I dont realy like the game monsters are so fast and u are so slow bc of the joystik movement

reviews.review_title: The best backrooms game in meta quest
reviews.review_description: Finally i can this Game and i can say that its peak
THE QUIALTY IS SO GOOD AND RELISTIC
We need more levels for free

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! I really appreciate it! Don't worry, free to play players will get new levels in the future! Once we add more levels in the game, free to play players will also get an additional older level. So for example, if we have 30 levels in total, 15 levels will be available to free to play players.

reviews.review_description: Only problem is bugs but it’s early access so what can u do

this game is so good especially that its free one thing that i understand and i dont hate but sometimes when u go to another level u like reset to the lobby but it rarely happens its a good game i expected it to be the boring bug goriila tag games but its not this game is better then the payed one I HIGHLEY recommend/edit One thing that i dont get sometimes when i play it skips levels like moltin or kittys room and the end Idk why  Is it me am i doing something wrong or

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5 star review! We really appreciate it. Thanks for also reporting that bug, we are gonna look at it and we should have a fix by the next patch coming this week which will fix some bugs and improve on existing things in our game. -nat1x

reviews.review_description:
I feel like having a different username than others shouldn't outright humiliate people by banning people and changing their username to "ISaySlurs____".
Please fix your stupid username system and stop being harsh over 2 or 3 letters.

Can be reproduced by changing username to "burningskies".

loved it, playtime for me was roughly two hours but me and my friend were messing around anyway, got glitched out of the map, was fun, amazing game, I recommend it instead of those gtag movement ones. good game for a single developer, running animations were funny too.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We really appreciate the kind comments<3 Stay tuned for more content! -nat1x

reviews.review_title: Good game, but has tons of problems
reviews.review_description: I like the game and how it is, and I know it is early access, but it is basically impossible. First off, partygoers in level fun are so buggy. What I mean is that they will charge at you even if they don't see you or you are crouching, so basically it is impossible. Another weird problem is that I get sent to the sanctuary randomly and lose my progress. My last issue I found was that there is no save file, so basically if you get sent to your sanctuary somehow, you have to start from level 0.

developer_response.body: Hey thanks for the review! We are aware of an issue that is causing players to get kicked from the lobby. We are working on it. For level fun, open your UI and hit "Restart Level". This should reset the level itself and it will fix partygoer's positions. Next update, we are gonna bring back Level Checkpoints for free to play players.

reviews.review_description:
Well worth the download, my first game (when I could finally figure out how to start) was absolute class.

For an early access game this already has me very tempted to buy the full game. Gonna play a few more runs on level 0, no doubt I'll be convinced.

Did have a few issues but that's more than to be expected with EA.

If there's enough variety on offer I can see this being an excellent multiplayer alternative to Backrooms by Sidequest (absolutely buy that if you're a liminal space fan)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, we really appreciate it! <3 If you can, please report any bugs in our discord server so we can fix them: discord.gg/paranoiavr

reviews.review_description: Really good game looks really good i only had a problem when i got to level 2 and walked up to the mannequin it crashed my quest two headset hard while my other friends who have quest 3s was fine. I had to factory reset my hwadset to get it to work lucky i fixed it but other than that the game is a lot of fun.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! I appreciate it. Sorry to hear that you crashed! We are taking a look at that level now but I will remind you that Paranoia is better played on a Quest 3/3s headset.

reviews.review_description: This game is incredible it is a perfect mix between scary fun and liminal it has the cozy backrooms and kitty's house down to level run it is very fun finding exits with your friends while the monsters are chasing you. Very fun game love to see it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We really appreciate it!! Stay tuned for upcoming levels and content <3 -nat1x

reviews.review_description: The game its great scary and fun to Play i got random peopole and it was really fun the game Has its scary moments the only think thats need to be reworked is the almond water mechanic but despide this i really recommend to Play it

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5 Star Review! The game is still early in development but we hear you about the Almond Water Mechanic. Shoot me a message on Discord: _nat1x and tell me your feedback on the Almond Water

reviews.review_description: Just make the game money at the point instead for making us to pay for levels game is good and all has potential but don’t make us buy levels just make the game money￼

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for the review, we really appreciate it! You don't have to buy the Full-Game DLC to get access to more levels. In future updates once we add more levels to the game, we will make previously-unavailable older levels available for FREE! For example, if we have 30 levels in total. We would have 15+ levels completely for free. We certainly hope you can stick around for future updates.

When I see new games I download them and play them once but this one is different I’ve been playing this game nonstop every day it’s a mixture of funny moments with friends and horror I love this game and I hope there will be more to come

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome review! I am really glad you enjoy the game! Be tuned for new content!! <3 -nat1x

reviews.review_description: This is honestly the best backrooms vr game I’ve seen ever. The pizza in the starting room looks literally edible same with the cake on level fun. Everything is incredibly realistic and detailed, better than all oculus backrooms games I’ve seen. (Noclip VR doesn’t even compare.)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review!! We really appreciate it :)

reviews.review_description: Hands down the best backrooms game WITHOUT gorilla tag movement. It reminds me of no clip but without swinging your arms and breaking your wrist in the process. But that's besides the point, even though the game is in early access and has some bugs that need to be fixed you can still have fun with your friends and randoms while getting chased by entities and escape the backrooms :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5-star review! I appreciate it! We will add more older levels to free to play players in the future once we add newer levels as a thanks for playing the game. We are working on it!

I’ve been looking for a fun backrooms game and this one hit the spot the graphics are insane especially for level fun highly recommend playing it
